testTarget.reason: Audio playback UI is essential for listening practice — no tests exist. First missing item in priority list after all critical hooks already covered.

notes: All critical hooks (useAudioPlayer, useFurigana, useChatSession) already have tests. Only remaining untested hook is useKanjiKeyboardShortcuts.ts (non-critical). Previously large components have been refactored — none exceed 300 lines now.
